name: BUDA JUICE, INC.
business: Buda Juice sells UltraFresh, cold-crafted citrus-based juices, lemonades, and wellness shots to grocery retailers, using a continuous cold chain to deliver fresh products.

exposures.sentence: Buda Juice is pioneering the UltraFreshTM juice category through our end-to-end cold chain platform that delivers always cold, freshly crafted juice, lemonades and wellness shots to grocery retailers in Texas.
We maintain continuous 35°F temperature control from fruit to shelf, delivering products with 8–12 day shelf life.
Our products rely heavily on high-quality, fresh citrus which are agricultural commodities subject to seasonal variability, environmental conditions, possible tariffs, and supply chain constraints.

catalysts.event: Phase Two Southeast hub in South Carolina completion
catalysts.sentence: Phase Two establishes a Southeast hub in South Carolina (projected to be completed in 2026) potentially serving 75 million consumers

catalysts.event: Phase Three Western hub in Arizona/Nevada completion
catalysts.sentence: followed by Phase Three’s Western hub in Arizona/Nevada (projected to be completed in 2027) potentially serving 60 million consumers.
On January 8, 2026, we began trading in the NYSE American under the ticker BUDA.

catalysts.event: Statutory conversion from LLC to Delaware corporation
catalysts.sentence: On January 1, 2026, we undertook a statutory conversion from Buda Juice, LLC a Texas limited liability company to Buda Juice, Inc. a Delaware corporation
